title: Section 33
content: 1* * * It shall be lawful for the said Association to increase its Capital Stock; provided always that no such increase shall take place unless it be authorized by a vote of two extraordinary general meetings of Proprietors specially convened for that purpose, of which meetings the second shall be held not less than three calendar months after the first.
footnote: 1. The words “And it is hereby enacted, that” omitted by Act 12 of 1891, s. 2 and Sch. I
